failures.description: The agent misinterpreted the ProductCatalogSearch output by selecting item 2243454707 at $164.46 instead of the actual cheapest available Electric Kettle, item 1240311797 at $137.17.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to identify the cheapest available Electric Kettle using the ProductCatalogSearch results. The tool output at index 3 returned items sorted by ascending price, with item 1240311797 priced at $137.17 as the first and cheapest result. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the answer as item 2243454707 at $164.46, which is the last and most expensive listed item. This directly contradicts the relevant tool output. The later Evaluator approval does not resolve the error.
